_description: Replaces jrTriageInbox_FULL + forwardToAmanda. Triggered by Gmail Pub/Sub push notification via webhook.
name: OpenClaw: JR Email Triage & Route

nodes.name: Gmail Push Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives Pub/Sub notification when JR gets new email. Payload: { emailAddress, historyId, role, timestamp }

nodes.name: Validate Request
nodes.notes: Verify the notification is for JR's account

nodes.name: Get New Messages
nodes.notes: Fetch unread inbox messages. Uses Gmail OAuth — configure credentials in n8n.

nodes.name: Triage: Classify Email
nodes.notes: Applies triage rules to classify emails and determine Amanda routing.

nodes.name: Apply Gmail Labels
nodes.notes: Apply triage labels to each email in Gmail.

nodes.name: Forward to Amanda

parameters.subject: =[{{ $json.amandaRoute.action }}] {{ $json.subject }}

nodes.notes: Forwards to Amanda with structured action envelope.

nodes.name: Mark as Forwarded
nodes.notes: Anti-loop guard — marks email as already forwarded.
